name: Popcorn--Cajun Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Pop the popcorn.
2. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
3. Add the spices to the melted butter and stir until combined.
4. Drizzle the butter-spice mixture over the unseasoned popcorn.
5. Toss the popcorn until it is well coated with the seasoning.
